package.name: MapDesc

description.brief: convert maps from image or formal description to simulation or navigation and back

package.description: **Map Desc**ription System for Robotics - generate and exports walls and other static objects from different sources to import into robotic simulations or as base for autonomous navigation. Can generate environments for navigation simulations (e.g. navsim-2d or Gazebo) from a given image as map using OpenCV or a map from a web-based editor. The map can also be exported into an image or yaml as input for the editor.
package.author: Andreas Bresser/andreas.bresser@dfki.de
